name: fiscalpoint-landing
description: Landing page de FiscalPoint — facturación electrónica e-CF / DGII

scripts.build: npm run posts && tsc -b && npm run optimize:img && vite build && vite build --ssr src/entry-server.tsx --outDir dist-ssr && node scripts/prerender.mjs
scripts.build:client: npm run posts && tsc -b && vite build
